scripts.dev: concurrently -n bot,web -c magenta,cyan "pnpm run dev:bot" "pnpm run dev:web"
scripts.dev:bot: cd ai-realtime && source .venv/bin/activate && python -m uvicorn src.main:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000 --reload
scripts.setup: cd ai-realtime && python -m venv .venv && source .venv/bin/activate && pip install -r requirements.txt && cd ../ux-web && pnpm install
